description: Company contractor directory page renders at /company/contractors
steps: Open company.contractors.tsx and verify it uses RoleGuard with allowedRole='company'
Verify it renders Navbar, CompanySidebar, and main content area
Verify it displays directoryTitle and directoryDesc from i18n

description: Contractor directory has specialty filter and name search
steps: Open company.contractors.tsx and verify Select component with CONTRACTOR_SPECIALTIES options
Verify Select uses options prop (not children) matching the Select component API
Verify Input component for name search with onKeyDown Enter handler
Verify search button that triggers loadContractors with filter values
Open ContractorProfileCard.tsx and verify it renders contractor logo or Wrench icon fallback
Verify it shows displayName, companyName, specialty badge
Verify it links to /contractors/{id} for the public profile
Verify it uses memo for performance
